create-hierarchical-bookmarks-pdfbookmar.title: Create Hierarchical Bookmarks with PdfBookmarkEditor
create-hierarchical-bookmarks-pdfbookmar.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to PdfBookmarkEditor, build a hierarchy of Chapter and Section bookmarks, and save the updated document.

import-merge-bookmarks-from-external-pdf.title: Import and Merge Bookmarks from External PDF
import-merge-bookmarks-from-external-pdf.description: Shows how to extract bookmarks from a source PDF and add them to another PDF while preserving their order using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to CSV
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-csv.description: Shows how to extract the bookmark hierarchy from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and write each bookmark's title, destination page number, and hierarchy level to a CSV file.

update-pdf-bookmark-destination-to-page-.title: Update PDF Bookmark Destination to Page 10
update-pdf-bookmark-destination-to-page-.description: Demonstrates locating a bookmark in a PDF with PdfBookmarkEditor, changing its destination to page 10, and saving the modified document.

delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Delete All Bookmarks from PDF
delete-all-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove every bookmark from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor and save the cleaned file.

delete-bookmark-and-verify.title: Delete a Bookmark from PDF and Verify Removal
delete-bookmark-and-verify.description: Demonstrates how to remove a specific bookmark from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, save the updated document, and confirm the deletion by re‑extracting the bookmarks.

add-top-level-blue-bookmark-to-first-pag.title: Add Top-Level Blue Bookmark to First Page
add-top-level-blue-bookmark-to-first-pag.description: Demonstrates how to create a top-level bookmark that links to the first page of a PDF and sets its title color to blue using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-subbookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.title: Add Sub‑Bookmarks to PDF Chapter
add-subbookmarks-to-pdf-chapter.description: Demonstrates creating a parent bookmark for a chapter, attaching child bookmarks for sections, and saving the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Hierarchical JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json.description: Demonstrates how to extract bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert them into a nested object model, and serialize the hierarchy to a pretty‑printed JSON file.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to XML
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-xml.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF document with PdfBookmarkEditor and export its bookmark hierarchy to an XML file.

import-bookmarks-from-json.title: Import Bookmarks from JSON into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-json.description: Shows how to read hierarchical bookmark data from a JSON file, convert it to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Bookmark objects, and add them to a PDF using PdfBookmarkEditor.

batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Table of Contents Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-toc-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and add a top‑level "Table of Contents" bookmark to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

validate-pdf-bookmarks-count.title: Validate PDF Bookmarks Count Using PdfBookmarkEditor
validate-pdf-bookmarks-count.description: Creates a simple PDF, adds a bookmark for each page with PdfBookmarkEditor, saves it, then extracts the bookmarks to verify that the count matches the number of pages.

modify-pdf-bookmark-title.title: Modify PDF Bookmark Title Using MemoryStream
modify-pdf-bookmark-title.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array with a MemoryStream, change an existing bookmark title, and return the updated PDF as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-bookmarks-external-urls.title: Create PDF Bookmarks with External URLs
create-pdf-bookmarks-external-urls.description: Shows how to add bookmarks that open external web pages in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-pdf-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.title: Update PDF Bookmark Titles to Title Case with Proper Nouns
update-pdf-bookmark-titles-to-title-case.description: Demonstrates how to extract PDF bookmarks, convert their titles to title case while preserving defined proper nouns, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.title: Delete Bookmarks Matching a Regex Pattern
delete-bookmarks-matching-regex.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, extract its bookmarks, and automatically remove those whose titles match a specified regular expression using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.title: Collapse Specific PDF Bookmarks to Improve Outline Visibility
collapse-specific-pdf-bookmarks.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically set selected PDF bookmarks to a collapsed state using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, improving the initial outline view for readers.

adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.title: Adjust PDF Bookmarks After Inserting Pages
adjust-pdf-bookmarks-after-inserting-pag.description: Demonstrates how to insert pages at the beginning of a PDF and shift existing bookmark destinations accordingly using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Text Outline
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-text.description: Shows how to extract bookmarks from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor and write them to a plain‑text file with indentation that reflects the bookmark hierarchy.

import-ofd-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Import Bookmarks from OFD into PDF
import-ofd-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an OFD file, extract its bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and add those bookmarks to a new PDF document.

add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Bookmark to PDF
add-javascript-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a PDF bookmark that executes JavaScript code when clicked using Aspose.Pdf Facades.

batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.title: Batch Delete Bookmarks from Encrypted PDFs
batch-delete-bookmarks-from-encrypted-pd.description: Demonstrates how to open password‑protected PDFs, remove all bookmarks using PdfBookmarkEditor, and save the cleaned files in a batch operation.

rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.title: Rename PDF Bookmarks Using a Translation Dictionary
rename-pdf-bookmarks-using-translation-d.description: Shows how to rename existing PDF bookmarks by applying a translation map with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfBookmarkEditor.

bookmark-toc-consistency-check.title: Validate Bookmark Page Numbers Against Table of Contents
bookmark-toc-consistency-check.description: Extracts PDF bookmarks, generates a simple table of contents by reading the first line of each page, and compares the two to report missing or mismatched entries.

create-image-bookmarks-in-pdf.title: Create Bookmarks for Images in a PDF
create-image-bookmarks-in-pdf.description: Shows how to locate images on each page of a PDF and add bookmarks that navigate directly to those pages using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

set-bookmark-zoom-level-150.title: Set Bookmark Zoom Level to 150% in PDF
set-bookmark-zoom-level-150.description: Shows how to update PDF bookmark entries so that pages open at 150% magnification using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-excel.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to Excel Workbook
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-excel.description: Demonstrates how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, place their title, level, and destination page into a table, and save the result as an Excel file using Aspose.Pdf.

import-csv-bookmarks-into-pdf.title: Import CSV Bookmarks into PDF
import-csv-bookmarks-into-pdf.description: The example reads a CSV file containing bookmark title, level, and page number, builds a hierarchical Bookmark structure, and adds it to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.

create-bookmark-to-named-destination.title: Create Bookmark to Named Destination in PDF
create-bookmark-to-named-destination.description: Demonstrates how to add a named destination to a PDF and then create a bookmark that links to that destination using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-duplicate-bookmarks-from-pdf.title: Remove Duplicate Bookmarks from PDF
remove-duplicate-bookmarks-from-pdf.description: Shows how to extract all bookmarks from a PDF, filter out duplicates based on title and page number, delete the original bookmarks, and recreate only the unique ones using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add 'Reviewed' Bookmark to PDFs
batch-add-reviewed-bookmark-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a folder and add a "Reviewed" bookmark on the last page of each document using the PdfBookmarkEditor facade.

add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.title: Add Colored Bookmarks to PDF Sections
add-colored-bookmarks-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create PDF bookmarks with custom colors (red for warnings, green for informational sections) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Bookmarks to JSON
export-pdf-bookmarks-to-json__v2.description: Demonstrates how to read the bookmark hierarchy from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, convert it to a DTO, and serialize the structure to a JSON file.

import-bookmarks-from-database.title: Import Bookmarks from Database into PDF
import-bookmarks-from-database.description: Shows how to retrieve bookmark records (simulated) and add them to an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfBookmarkEditor.
